name: Default marker (empty)
notes: Blank marker should use the normal Leaflet marker

name: Single emoji marker
notes: Should render as one text marker

name: Multi-unicode marker
notes: Should render both unicode characters together as one marker

name: Plain text marker
notes: Should render plain text instead of the default marker

name: Missing local image fallback
notes: Should resolve to /icons/missing-icon.png and fall back to the default marker if the image does not exist
